title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_diff
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_diff' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

base.description: Base ref (e.g. "main"). Ancestor notation is accepted (e.g. "HEAD~3", "main^2"). Omit for unstaged changes.

head.description: Head ref (e.g. "feature-branch"). Ancestor notation is accepted (e.g. "HEAD~3", "main^2"). Defaults to HEAD. Used only when `base` is set.

path.description: Scope to a single file. Unioned with `paths` if both given.

paths.description: Scope to multiple files (must be within repo root). Unioned with `path` if both given.

staged.description: Show staged changes (`git diff --staged`). Ignored if `base` is set.

unified.description: Context lines around each change (`-U<n>`). Default: 3. Use 0 for no context.

maxBytes.description: Max UTF-8 bytes of diff text to return (default 512000). Oversized output is truncated with truncated:true.
